robots.name: Blockchain Builder
robots.description: Build a blockchain from scratch. Add transactions, mine blocks, tamper with data, watch the chain validate or break.
robots.creator: serge-ivo

robots.name: SHA-256 Hash Explorer
robots.description: Type text and see SHA-256 update in real-time. Avalanche effect demo, bit visualization, mining challenge.
robots.creator: serge-ivo

robots.name: Merkle Tree Builder
robots.description: Build Merkle trees visually. Add leaves, watch hashes propagate, verify proofs, tamper with nodes.
robots.creator: serge-ivo

robots.name: Consensus Simulator
robots.description: Compare PoW, PoS, and PBFT consensus algorithms. Byzantine fault tolerance, message passing, fork resolution.
robots.creator: serge-ivo

robots.name: HD Wallet Simulator
robots.description: Generate mnemonics, derive keys via BIP-39/44, see the derivation tree, sign and verify messages.
robots.creator: serge-ivo

robots.name: Mining Race
robots.description: Watch 5 miners race to find valid hashes. Adjustable difficulty, hashrate stats, block rewards.
robots.creator: serge-ivo

robots.name: Smart Contract Sandbox
robots.description: Write and execute contracts in a simplified VM. Stack, memory, storage visualization. Gas tracking.
robots.creator: serge-ivo

robots.name: AMM / DEX Simulator
robots.description: Constant-product market maker. Swap tokens, add liquidity, see price curves, impermanent loss calculator.
robots.creator: serge-ivo

robots.name: P2P Network Simulator
robots.description: Watch transactions gossip through a network. Partition nodes, create forks, resolve with longest chain.
robots.creator: serge-ivo

robots.name: Token Economics Designer
robots.description: Design tokens with custom supply curves, bonding curves, inflation models. Simulate transfers and economics.
robots.creator: serge-ivo

robots.name: Digital Signatures
robots.description: ECDSA step by step. Key generation, signing, verification. Visual elliptic curve operations.
robots.creator: serge-ivo

robots.name: Fork & Chain Resolution
robots.description: Watch blockchains fork, compete, and resolve. 51% attack simulation, double-spend demo, orphan blocks.
robots.creator: serge-ivo

robots.name: Zero-Knowledge Proofs
robots.description: Ali Baba cave ZKP demo. Play prover or verifier. Watch probability of cheating drop exponentially.
robots.creator: serge-ivo

robots.name: DeFi Yield Farming
robots.description: Stake in pools, watch rewards accumulate, compound vs simple interest, risk assessment, gas optimization.
robots.creator: serge-ivo

robots.name: Block Anatomy Explorer
robots.description: Interactive block structure. Expand each field, compare Bitcoin vs Ethereum blocks, inspect the genesis block.
robots.creator: serge-ivo

robots.name: Cryptocurrency Timeline
robots.description: Interactive history from Diffie-Hellman (1976) to today. Key events, innovations, and their connections.
robots.creator: serge-ivo

robots.name: Attack Laboratory
robots.description: Simulate 51% attacks, Sybil attacks, eclipse attacks, and reentrancy exploits step by step.
robots.creator: serge-ivo

robots.name: DAO Governance
robots.description: Build a DAO: set voting rules, create proposals, vote with token-weighted governance.
robots.creator: serge-ivo

robots.name: DEX Pipeline
robots.description: Full decentralized exchange: create token, add liquidity, trade, watch price chart.
robots.creator: serge-ivo

robots.name: Layer 2 Scaling
robots.description: Optimistic vs ZK rollups side-by-side. Batching, fraud proofs, throughput comparison.
robots.creator: serge-ivo

robots.name: NFT Workshop
robots.description: Draw pixel art, generate metadata, mint NFTs. Full ERC-721 flow simulated in browser.
robots.creator: serge-ivo
